Part.Source:
Event Start
tbComoSolucionar.Visible= 0
pro.Visible = 1 funcaoAutorizada.Visible = 0 Sucesso.Visible = 0 Falha.Visible = 0
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Capa.FilCod &NfeCod = &WizardData.Capa.NfeCod &SolCod = &WizardData.Capa.SolCod
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod
if NfeSts = Status_NFe.Digitando &Random = random()* 1000000000 &ProgressId = 'autoNFe' + trim(Str(&Context.EmpCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.FilCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod)) + trim(str(&Random)) &ProgressId = &ProgressId.trim() scaProgressBar1.ProcessId = &ProgressId scaProgressBar1.UpdateProgressURL = retornaProgresso.Link(&ProgressId) scaProgressBar1.Start()
RecepcaoNFe.Submit('RecepcaoNFe', &ProgressId, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &SolCod) txtMsg.Caption = '' Else wwNotas.Link() EndIF
Exit
When none wwNotas.Link() EndFor
btnCapaNfce.SetFocus() RetornaEmpresaModulo.Call(&EmpCod,moduloSistema.AGRO_INSUMOS,&PossuiModulo_AGRO_INSUMOS)
EndEvent
Event Enter
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' Do 'FinishWizard' &WebSession.Remove(&WebSessionKey) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoCapaNfce'
2
Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpNota(!'Totais', !'Capa', false)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoProdutos'
6
Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' wpNota(!'Totais', !'Produtos', false)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoRetransmitir'
//GRAVA XML AUTORIZACAO ValidaSchemaNFe.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Context.FilCod,&Mensagem) if &Mensagem.IsEmpty() GeraXmlNFeModelo55_4.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, 'S', &Context.PesCod, 'E', &SolCod)
&WizardData.Capa.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.Capa.NfeCod = &NfeCod &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Capa.SolCod = &SolCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
wpNota(!'Autorizar', !'Autorizar', false) Else msg(&Mensagem) EndiF
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoConsultarNFCe'
//GRAVA XML AUTORIZACAO GravaConsultaSEFAZ.call('', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod)
&WizardData.Capa.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.Capa.NfeCod = &NfeCod &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Capa.SolCod = &SolCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
wpNota(!'Autorizar', !'Autorizar', false)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNovaNFCe'
2
&WebSession.Remove(&WebSessionKey) wpNota.Link('', '', false)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoReimprimir'
8
do 'imprimenota'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey))
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'FinishWizard'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event scaProgressBar1.OnComplete
pro.Visible = 0
For Each Order ProgressId Where ProgressId = &ProgressId
txtMsg.ForeColor = RGB(210,130,0) txtMsg.Caption = ProgressLogXml.Trim()
prcTrataRetorno.Call('NFE', ProgressLogXml,&erroMensagem)
Do CAse CAse ProgressLogXml.ToUpper() like '%204%' and ProgressLogXml.ToUpper() like '%DUPLICIDADE%' //or ProgressLogXml.ToUpper() like '%STATUS%204'//JDF AJUDANDO O CLIENTE A RESOLVER PROBLEMAS IDIOTAS QUE O CLIENTE NAO CONSEGUE //GRAVA XML AUTORIZACAO GravaConsultaSEFAZ.call('', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod)
&WizardData.Capa.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.Capa.NfeCod = &NfeCod &WizardData.Capa.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Capa.SolCod = &SolCod &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson())
wpNota(!'Autorizar', !'Autorizar', false)
Case not &erroMensagem.IsEmpty() tbComoSolucionar.Visible= 1 txtComoSolucionar.Caption= &erroMensagem
Otherwise do 'imprimenota' EndCase
Exit EndFor
EndEvent
Sub 'imprimenota'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, NfeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where NfeCod = &NfeCod
Do Case Case not NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() and NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada //and &PossuiModulo_AGRO_INSUMOS = 'N' Do 'AbreNota'
// Case not NfeArqXml.IsEmpty() and NfeSts = Status_NFe.Autorizada and &PossuiModulo_AGRO_INSUMOS = 'S' // If NfeRctPen <> Status_SimNao.Sim // do 'AbreNota' // else // msg( DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Erro Imprimir NF-e!", 'ATENÇÃO! Não foi possível imprimir a NF-e pois está pendente de Receituário. Favor verificar!' ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"") ) // EndIf
OtherWise Falha.Visible = 1 BtnCapaNfce.SetFocus() EndCase
Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'AbreNota'
funcaoAutorizada.Visible = 1 Sucesso.Visible = 1
GravarStatusIMpressao.Submit('GravarStatusIMpressao', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, 0) txtMsg.ForeColor = RGB(0,210,25) &RandomVarchar = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(serverTime()) &Documento = 'TICKET' + &RandomVarchar.Trim() //+ '.pdf'
&Window.Url = RELJAS043_ToScreen.Link(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &NfeCod, &Documento) &Window.Height = 500 &Window.Width = 900 &Window.Open() btnNovaNFCe.SetFocus()
EndSub
